jack_admin.content:
Goku is a powerful warrior and one of the main protagonists in the Dragon Ball Z series. He is a Saiyan, a member of a extraterrestrial race known for their incredible strength and combat abilities. According to the document "Dragon Ball Z Universe and Transformation Data" [1], Goku's Super Saiyan transformation relies on a high concentration of microscopic "S-Cells" within his bloodstream, typically triggered by an intense emotional catalyst such as extreme rage or despair.

As stated in the same document, Goku has achieved this advanced genetic state multiple times throughout the series. His incredible strength and abilities have allowed him to compete with some of the most powerful foes in the Dragon Ball universe.

Source: Dragon Ball Z Universe and Transformation Data - Page 1

dragon_ball_user.content: The eternal prince of Saiyans. According to the provided context, Vegeta's homeworld, Planet Vegeta, was destroyed by Frieza to prevent the realization of the legendary Super Saiyan prophecy. Source: dragon_ball_lore.txt - Page 1

sonic_user.content: Is there any data regarding Shadow?

Shadow the Hedgehog is mentioned in the provided context as:

"The 'Ultimate Life Form' awakened by Dr. Eggman from suspension on Prison Island. He seeks vengeance against humanity following a tragic raid on the ARK fifty years ago."

Source: sonic_adventure_2_lore.txt - Page 1
